productDisplayName: FIFA Men Printed Navy Blue T-shirts
description: CompositionNavy blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, print on the chest and brand tab on the left sleeveFittingRegularWash careonly machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowRemove immediatelyCool iron, but do not iron on designThis navy blue T-shirt from fifa is dedicated to Brazil, also known as Selecao, the victorious team of the 1962 fifa World Cup. Flaunt your pride for this team with this tee, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with denims and sneakers for a casual sporty look.
